existing_rules_covering.explanation: This is already covered as an inherited-governance alignment issue. The source authority requires freeze only after all active reviewers are `approved` or true `conditional` and any required `regression_sanity` pass is complete; a local terminal-state model that keys only off `material pushback` is reinventing and weakening those inherited review semantics. The self-check aspect is a downstream ARB-005 enforcement detail, but the core gap is failure to derive local review legality from the governing sources.
